title: acalypha aspericocca
intro: Acalypha aspericocca, also known as the rough-fruited copperleaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. Acalypha aspericocca has been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, offering several health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing. The plant's leaves and roots can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
